headline: NextEra (NEE) Anticipates Adding up to 30 Gigawatts of Power for Data Centers by 2035
summary: NextEra Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NEE) is one of the Goldman Sachs Energy Stocks: 10 Stocks to Buy. On March 3, 2026, Reuters reported that NextEra Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NEE) plans to install between 15 and 30 gigawatts of new power generation capacity for data centers in the United States by 2035. The corporation presented the proposal in […]

headline: The Best 3 Renewable Energy Stocks to Buy and Hold for Decades
summary: Renewable energy is the future, but you might want to include some of the past in the mix, too.
